towards boundary.

subject: english
text:
Tom Sawyer hated Monday mornings because he had to go to school. He always tried to think of excuses
to avoid it. One Monday, he pretended to have a sore toe to skip school. But his Aunt Polly found out the
truth and sent him to school anyway.

subject: english
text:
What trick did Tom try to avoid going to school?
2 .Tom Sawyer was always full of clever ideas to avoid work or school. On this particular Monday, he
thought hard about how to skip school. After failing to find a real illness, he made loud noises and acted as
though he was suffering. He complained about a sore toe and pretended it was very serious. Aunt Polly,
although concerned at first, soon understood his game. She smiled to herself, knowing Tom’s nature, and
gently persuaded him that there was nothing wrong with him. In the end, Tom had no choice but to get ready
for school.

text: IV.Study the picture given below. Write a description or an account of what the picture suggests to you in a paragraph: There was a small village on the banks of a river. Coconut trees grew on his banks. Village was surrounded by hills. At dawn, the people would be woken up by the chirping of birds on the branches of the trees. As soon as the residents got up, the first thing they saw was the calm water of the river and people moving out in their  boats. The people lived a simple life. They sold coconuts and fish from the river for their livelihood. Boats  were  the only means of transportation. They used  them for fishing, transporting goods and people across Poem:  Upagupta poem

his kingdom. He promised a great reward to anyone who could answer his questions. Many wise men came,
but they all gave different answers.

subject: english
text:
Betty was a great sprinter. She had won three gold medals at the 1956 Olympic Games in Melbourne. She
also got another gold medal at the 1964 Olympics in Tokyo. The poet says that it is all due to her hard work
and perseverance. She has the goal and the desire to achieve it.  Betty ran when her classmates were
walking. She sprinted when others were running. Others were playing but she was training others. She had
the fresh air, she listened to the words of her coach and others. She made continuous efforts. She didn’t mind
the physical problems.  She did not pay attention to ache because she had the only aim of reaching her goal.
She possessed strong will power . she encouraged by all . Due to hard work, dedication, perseverance ,
listening capacity patience she could succeed in her life.
